scripts.perf:bundle:ci:summary: node scripts/perf-bundle-ci-summary.mjs dist/bundle-report.json dist/bundle-delta.json dist/bundle-diff.md dist/bundle-ci-summary.md
scripts.perf:bundle-report:demo: env -u npm_config_devdir npm run build:demo && env -u npm_config_devdir npm run perf:bundle-report
scripts.perf:bundle-check:demo: env -u npm_config_devdir npm run build:demo && env -u npm_config_devdir npm run perf:bundle-report -- --max-index-kb 45 --max-total-kb 620
scripts.perf:bundle-report:json: env -u npm_config_devdir npm run build:demo && env -u npm_config_devdir npm run perf:bundle-report -- --json-out dist/bundle-report.json
scripts.perf:bundle:full: env -u npm_config_devdir npm run build:demo && env -u npm_config_devdir npm run perf:bundle-report -- --max-index-kb 45 --max-total-kb 620 --json-out dist/bundle-report.json && env -u npm_config_devdir npm run perf:bundle-diff:md -- docs/perf-baselines/bundle-report-latest.json dist/bundle-report.json --out dist/bundle-diff.md
scripts.perf:bundle:pr: env -u npm_config_devdir npm run perf:bundle-report:json && env -u npm_config_devdir npm run perf:bundle-diff:baseline:md:file
scripts.perf:bundle:record: env -u npm_config_devdir npm run perf:bundle-report:json && env -u npm_config_devdir npm run perf:bundle-baseline:snapshot && env -u npm_config_devdir npm run perf:bundle-history:md:file
scripts.perf:bundle:ci: env -u npm_config_devdir npm run perf:bundle-report -- --max-index-kb 45 --max-total-kb 620 --json-out dist/bundle-report.json && env -u npm_config_devdir npm run perf:bundle-diff:baseline:md:file && env -u npm_config_devdir npm run perf:bundle-history:md:file && env -u npm_config_devdir npm run perf:bundle-delta-check:baseline:json
scripts.perf:bundle-baseline:refresh: npm run perf:bundle-report:json && npm run perf:bundle-baseline:save
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build:demo && PW_PREVIEW_ONLY=1 VITE_SUPABASE_URL= VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY= npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: npm run build:demo && PW_PREVIEW_ONLY=1 VITE_SUPABASE_URL= VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY= playwright test e2e/smoke.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e:all: npm run test:e2e && npm run test:e2e:auth
scripts.ops:verify: npx supabase migration list && npx supabase functions list
scripts.ops:deploy:all: npx supabase db push --yes && npx supabase functions deploy residents-create && npx supabase functions deploy residents-get && npx supabase functions deploy residents-list && npx supabase functions deploy residents-soft-delete && npx supabase functions deploy residents-update && npx supabase functions deploy staff-soft-delete && npx supabase functions deploy activity-sessions-soft-delete && npx supabase functions deploy schedule-assignments-batch && npx supabase functions deploy scheduling-history-soft-delete && npx supabase functions deploy scheduling-sessions-list && npx supabase functions deploy activities-list && npx supabase functions deploy activity-sessions-list && npx supabase functions deploy scheduling-rules-get && npx supabase functions deploy staff-skills-list && npx supabase functions deploy staff-profiles-list && npx supabase functions deploy staff-profile-update && npx supabase functions deploy residents-import-validate && npx supabase functions deploy residents-import-commit && npx supabase functions deploy staff-import-validate && npx supabase functions deploy staff-import-commit && npx supabase functions deploy activity-sessions-import-validate && npx supabase functions deploy activity-sessions-import-commit && npx supabase functions deploy scheduling-kpi-history-list && npx supabase functions deploy scheduling-kpi-history-upsert && npx supabase functions deploy scheduling-kpi-history-clear && npx supabase functions deploy assessment-due-list && npx supabase functions deploy assessment-completion-records-list && npx supabase functions deploy assessment-completion-records-append && npx supabase functions deploy service-forms-list && npx supabase functions deploy service-forms-upsert && npx supabase functions deploy service-forms-soft-delete && npx supabase functions deploy audit-trail-append && npx supabase functions deploy audit-trail-list && npx supabase functions deploy admin-user-role-set
scripts.closeout:phase5: npm run acceptance:phase5 && npm run delivery:phase5:zip && npm run delivery:phase5:verify && npm run closeout:phase5:summary
scripts.closeout:phase5:fresh: npm run delivery:phase5:clean && npm run closeout:phase5
